Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft Luis Alvarez To Provide Furtehr Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, And Requests For Admissions, And To Provide Responses To Request For Production, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HUGH KING'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT LUIS ALVAREZ TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, FORM INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS AND TO PROVIDE RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION; AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. Appearances: Alexsis Beach of Rachel Lederman & Alexsis C. Beach (282.9306) for plaintiff and moving party; Erik Babcock of the Law Offices of Erik Babcock (510.452.8400) for defendant and responding party. Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: granted. Defendant must provide verified supplemental responses by May 16, 2011. Motion for sanctions granted. Defendant and defendant's counsel must remit $1,000 to plaintiff's counsel by May 31, 2011. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
